name: arrgh-api-live-tests
description: API live snapshot tests — real HTTP calls to a running server; not run in CI

scripts.test: vitest run src/library-flow-mangadex.live.test.ts src/library-flow.live.test.ts src/sources.live.test.ts src/discover.live.test.ts
scripts.test:update: vitest run -u src/library-flow-mangadex.live.test.ts src/library-flow.live.test.ts src/sources.live.test.ts src/discover.live.test.ts
